summary: Dynamic floating sine-wave text colorized animation component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-wave-text/src/TitleWaveText.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleWaveText` and `titleWaveTextDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleWaveText` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Wave Text Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-wave-text to my project. Preserve the exported TitleWaveTextProps API and register the TitleWaveText composition with the default props.
